description: GTG v2: discrete lr=1e-3, 5 tasks x 3 seeds = 15 exps on GPU 2,3

experiments.name: gtg_v2_ant_seed0
experiments.command: python train.py --task ant --horizon 64 --seed 0 && python evaluate.py --task ant --horizon 64 --ctx_len 32 --alpha 0.8 --seed 0
experiments.env_setup: export WANDB_API_KEY=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 && export WANDB_ENTITY=1585515136- && export WANDB_MODE=online && export OMP_NUM_THREADS=2 MKL_NUM_THREADS=2 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=2 TORCH_NUM_THREADS=2 && export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/xk/.mujoco/mujoco210/bin:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH && export MUJOCO_PY_FORCE_CPU=1 && export PYTHONPATH=/data/xk/zhaoyang/GTG-main:$PYTHONPATH
